description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named bazel that triggers on push and pull requests to the main branch, as well as on merge groups to main. The workflow consists of three jobs: format_bazel_files to format Bazel files, build_direct to build p4c directly, and build_indirect to build a 3rd party Bazel project depending on p4c as a subproject. Each build job uses Bazel caching, installs Flex and Bison, and calculates the build duration. The workflow also cancels any preceding run on the pull request.
